# services.easyeffects

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.easyeffects`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.easyeffects.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Easyeffects daemon. Note, it is necessary to add `nix programs.dconf.enable = true; ` to your system configuration for the daemon to work correctly. |
| `services.easyeffects.extraPresets` | `null or (attribute set of attribute set of (JSON value))` | List of presets to import to easyeffects. Presets are written to input and output folder in `$XDG_DATA_HOME/easyeffects`. Top level block (input/output) determines the folder the file is written to. See community presets at: https://github.com/wwmm/easyeffects/wiki/Community-Presets |
| `services.easyeffects.package` | `package` | The easyeffects package to use. |
| `services.easyeffects.preset` | `string` | Which preset to use when starting easyeffects. Will likely need to launch easyeffects to initially create preset. |
